Civic Ecological Platform · Lithuania

Every piece of waste
deserves to be found.

CleanPlanet is a citizen-powered platform where anyone can report waste on an interactive map, earn rewards for cleanup action, and help protect our natural environment.

How It Works

Three steps to a
cleaner world

Anyone with a smartphone can become an environmental guardian — no training required.

01
📍

Spot & Report

See illegal waste? Open CleanPlanet, drop a pin on the map and attach a photo. Takes under 60 seconds — no app download needed.

02
🤖

AI Verifies

Our AI moderation system verifies the report, classifies the waste type and sends structured data directly to local authorities.

03
💰

Earn Rewards

Every verified report earns CleanPoints. Redeem them for utility bill discounts, free waste disposal, and community benefits.

Environmental Impact

Real change,
measurable results

⚡

Faster Response

Real-time geo-tagged data reduces waste site response times from weeks to under 24 hours.

🌳

Protected Ecosystems

Early detection prevents waste from reaching forests, rivers, wetlands and coastal habitats.

📊

Open Environmental Data

Aggregated waste maps support policy decisions, EU reporting, and conservation research.

💶

Community Income

Citizens reduce household bills and create economic value through environmental action.

SDG 11

Sustainable Cities & Communities

SDG 12

Responsible Consumption & Production

SDG 15

Life on Land — Ecosystem Protection

SDG 17

Partnerships for the Goals

Reward System

Protecting nature
pays off

The CleanPoints system transforms environmental action into real economic value for every participant.

📍

Report a Site

Photograph and pin any illegal waste site on the map. Each verified report earns CleanPoints instantly.

+10 Points per report
🧹

Lead a Cleanup

Organise or join a registered cleanup event. Earn bonus points based on volume removed and area covered.

+50 Points per event
💡

Reduce Bills

Redeem CleanPoints for discounts on electricity, water bills, or waste disposal fees through partner municipalities.

Real money value
🌍

Community Impact

High-scoring communities unlock municipal cleanup funding and media recognition — creating a virtuous cycle.

Collective rewards
